thesis: Tesla's Optimus humanoid robot program and autonomous systems infrastructure position it as a primary beneficiary of Stage 7 robotics acceleration. Recent capex intensity and FSD/autonomy software stack provide integrated hardware-software advantage for physical AI deployment.
